<?php /** * libphonenumber-for-php-lite data file * This file has been @generated from libphonenumber data * Do not modify! * @internal */ namespace libphonenumber; class AlternateFormatsCountryCodeSet { // A set of all country codes for which data is available. public static $alternateFormatsCountryCodeSet = [ 7, 27, 30, 31, 34, 36, 39, 43, 44, 49, 52, 54, 55, 58, 61, 62, 64, 66, 81, 84, 90, 91, 94, 95, 255, 350, 351, 352, 358, 359, 372, 373, 380, 381, 385, 505, 506, 595, 675, 676, 679, 855, 856, 971, 972, 995, ]; }
